column1: Their motivation _____ improved if they had kicked a goal during the first half.
If Sue cuts the onions for the salad, Caroline _____ peel the mushrooms.
Tom _____ play the DJ if the others bring along their CDs.
If I were rich, my life _____ change completely.
If I had found her address, I _____ sent her an invitation.
If you had studied for the test, you _____ passed it.
I hope you _____ join us when we go to our country house next time.
How nice it _____ be for mother if he had a car.
When Nick comes, he _____ meet my parents.
It _____ been too wonderful if he had said that. But he didn't.
